case_title: JOSUE MARTINEZ VS. ONE BIG MAN & ONE BIG TRUCK MOVING CO., INC

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER AND PROOF OF SERVICES. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, JOSUE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ONE BIG MAN & ONE BIG TRUCK MOVING CO., INC NAVARRETTE, ROBERT DEFENDANT NAVARRETE WAIVED SERVICE. MR. WALLACE FOR DEFENDANT AUTHORIZED TO APPEAR REMOTELY DUE TO ILLNESS. PLAINTIFF DID NOT PROVE HIS CLAIM BY A PREPONDERANCE OF THE EVIDENCE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT ONE BIG MAN & ONE BIG TRUCK MOVING CO., INC ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS, [FRED WALLACE - FOR DEFENDANT - PICKED UP EXHIBIT]
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MARTINEZ, JOSUE AS TO DEFENDANT ONE BIG MAN & ONE BIG TRUCK MOVING CO., INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-24-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $110) SERVED SEP-01-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT NAVARRETTE, ROBERT

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-24-2022 - CONTINUED FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER TO DEC-27-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JOSUE MARTINEZ IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY NON-COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER PATRICIA SERVELLOA WHO WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETERS OATH BY THE COURTROOM CLERK. DEFENDANT ONE BIG MAN & ONE BIG TRUCK MOVING CO., INC IS PRESENT, ORALLY STATED AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR REPRESENTED BY FRED WALLACE. DEFENDANT ROBERT NAVARRETTE IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS COURT TO PROVIDE A SPANISH INTERPRETER. DEFENDANT ONE BIG MAN & ONE BIG TRUCK MOVING CO., INC WILL NOT WAIVE SERVICE. PROOF OF SERVICE FILED 9-28-2022 ON DEFENDANT ONE BIG MAN & ONE BIG TRUCK MOVING CO., INC IS LISTED AS SUBSTITUTE SERVED TO "FRED WALLACE - AGENT FOR SERVICE", DEFENDANT TO RE-DO PROOF OF SERVICE TO SERVE TO CORRECT AGENT "WOLFGANG MATT" AND AGENT ADDRESS AS LISTED ON THE SECRETARY OF STATE WEBSITE. PROOF OF SERVICE FILED 9-28-2022 ON DEFENDANT ROBERT NAVARRETTE, FORM SECTION #3 HAS NOT BEEN FILLED OUT CORRECTLY; NO BOX BEING CHECKED. DEFENDANT TO COMPLETE AND RE-FILE AN AMENDED PROOF OF SERVICE ON ROBERT NAVARRETTE. NO NEED TO RE-DO SERVICE ON DEFENDANT ROBERT NAVARRETTE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
AMENDED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$110.00) SERVED SEP-01-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT NAVARRETTE, ROBERT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-27-2022 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $95. SERVED NOV-10-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ONE BIG MAN & ONE BIG TRUCK MOVING CO., INC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $110) SERVED SEP-06-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ONE BIG MAN & ONE BIG TRUCK MOVING CO., INC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-27-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-27-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF JOSUE MARTINEZ PRESENT, ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER KENNETH WRIGHT. DEFENDANT FREDERICK WALLACE APPEARING ON BEHALF OF ONE BIG MAN & ONE BIG TRUCK MOVING CO., INC. PRESIDENT AND OWNER, CALLED IN SICK AND RECEIVED ORAL APPROVAL TO APPEAR VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT ROBERT NAVARETTE APPEARED AND WAIVED SERVICE. BOTH SIDES STIPULATED TO A JUDGE PRO TEM; FREDERICK WALLACE ORALLY AUTHORIZED THE CLERK TO SIGN THE STIPULATION ON HIS BEHALF. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
